description_long: This is a mid-century modern style armchair featuring a broad, slightly reclined backrest and a thick, cushioned seat, both upholstered in an olive green fabric. The chair is supported by four sturdy, slightly splayed wooden legs, and has wide, flat wooden armrests that extend parallel to the seat. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven textile, giving the chair a matte, soft appearance, while the wood has a dark, polished finish. The overall silhouette is boxy yet inviting, with a robust frame that suggests comfort and durability. The chair's proportions and materials make it suitable for lounge areas, waiting rooms, or residential living spaces. Its design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, blending comfort with a timeless, urban appeal.
description: A mid-century modern armchair with olive green fabric upholstery, dark wooden legs, and wide armrests. The chair has a boxy, comfortable silhouette and a sturdy, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick seat cushion, reclined backrest, and the full length of the wooden armrest and legs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad, rectangular backrest and the symmetry of the wooden frame and legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg structure, with clear visibility of the seat's depth and backrest angle.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide seat, both armrests, and the inviting, cushioned backrest.
